resources.string: Set a favourite agent to chat from here
Review Android permissions, special access, and privileged-tool exposure.
%1$d of %2$d supported capabilities are currently tool-usable in the %3$s flavor.
Android settings could not be opened for this capability.
Android storage access could not be saved.
This setup action will be wired by the capability implementation.
No token activity recorded in the last 24 hours.
No projects yet. Pull to refresh when VibSync is connected.
Conversational project setup isn’t wired to the registry API yet.
Start with the outcome. What should this project do, and what should the PM agent understand before work begins?
What should this project be called in the registry and project grid?
Where should coding agents work on this project? Use the absolute server path.
If there’s already a repository, link it now. You can also skip this and add it later.
Here’s the project intake I gathered. Create the project when it looks right.
This creates the registry project now. PM-agent brief handoff still needs backend support, so the intake notes are kept local for this step.
%1$s is ready to create, but project provisioning isn’t wired to the registry API yet.
Choose the name that should appear in the home grid and project chat.
Capture the mission, scope, and any details the PM agent should eventually inherit.
Use the absolute server path where coding agents should work, for example /opt/stacks/letta-mobile.
Optional now. Add the repository URL if one already exists.
%1$s doesn’t have a linked Letta agent yet.
Archive %1$s? This removes the project from active workflow surfaces, but you can unarchive it later from the backend.
Delete %1$s? This permanently removes the project from the registry and should only be used when you’re sure.
Use an absolute server path, for example /opt/stacks/letta-mobile.
Project folder path must start with /.
Matches a path already used by a project in this registry.
Android can save this absolute path, but server-side access still needs to be verified by VibSync or the coding agent runtime.
Saving path and Git URL for %1$s isn’t wired to the registry API yet.
These cards create local starter agents with sensible defaults. Real Letta template administration depends on server support and may be limited to cloud or admin-only deployments.
For reusable configurations today, use Agent clone/export/import from the Agents and Settings screens.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?
Use Material You colors on Android 12 and newer. This overrides the selected preset.
Material You dynamic color requires Android 12 or newer.
Show the Projects dashboard as the home screen. Requires a project registry endpoint on your server.
Status: unrestricted. Android is currently allowing Letta to run without battery optimization limits for more reliable locked-screen chat delivery.
Status: optimized. Allow unrestricted background delivery to improve locked-screen chat updates. This may use more battery, and some device makers may still limit background work.
Unable to open Android battery optimization settings.
This memory block will be permanently removed from the agent.
This removes the block from the current agent but keeps it in the block library.
Send a message to create a new conversation.
Memory-backed context shared with the project agent
No structured brief sections are available in this agent’s memory yet.
Stored in the project manager agent’s core memory
Live project-linked coding agent activity and embedded bot session status
No linked coding agents are currently visible for this project.
Capture issue details before routing them to the project manager agent
Use a structured report instead of ad-hoc chat messages. You can also type /bug in the chat input.
Review the requested tool actions before continuing.
Background delivery for new Letta messages
Open the conversation to see the latest update.
Keeps the app connected to the Letta server so incoming messages arrive in real time.
Context usage is not available yet.
Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
No discovered tools for this MCP server
Provide a JSON object matching the tool schema. Use {} for no arguments.
Use a Hermes-style bridge relay to expose Android control tools through Letta MCP. We’ll prefill the server form for an HTTP bridge so you only need the relay URL and any auth token.
Are you sure you want to delete this agent? This action cannot be undone.
No compatible app found to share the export
Configure the global LettaBot server, API key, and master Client Mode toggle.
Master switch. When on, agents with LettaBot routing enabled will route through the configured LettaBot server. When off, all chats use the direct-agent path.
Route chat through a configured lettabot server without changing the normal direct-agent path when this is off.
Stored encrypted on device. The same key is used for the connection test and WebSocket client mode.
Checks remote status and opens a WebSocket gateway session using the configured URL and key.
This clears the agent message history stored by Letta. This action cannot be undone.
Create a new agent from this agent’s export, with optional safety guards.
Cloning uses the current export format and re-imports it through Letta’s import endpoint.
Pick a Letta agent export file. You can optionally rename the imported agent and choose whether to overwrite matching custom tools.
Leave blank to keep the exported name
If enabled, imported tool definitions can replace matching custom tools on the server.
Recommended for clones to avoid copying chat history into the new agent.
Couldn’t read the selected import file.
No agents available. Create one first.
No messages available for this conversation
Delete %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
Changes here update the reusable block itself and can affect every agent attached to it.
Delete %1$d selected blocks? This action cannot be undone.
All available agents are already attached
Schedule admin isn\'t available on this Letta server.
No messages available for this batch
Comma-separated block ids. Clear the field to remove all linked blocks.
Use Edit to change linked block ids.
This will remove all server configurations and cached data. You will need to set up the app again.
Delete %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
Attach this tool to an agent to make it available in conversations and runs.
Tool name and schema are derived from the source code when you save.
Python source code (imports must be inside the function). The tool name is derived from the function definition.
